site.name: WSA Installer
site.tagline: Windows Subsystem for Android — One-Click Install with Google Play Store
site.shortTagline: Android Apps on Windows, One Click Away
site.author: MR CYBER
site.copyright: © 2026 AT Tech Zone. All rights reserved.
site.description: A professional tool that automates the entire process of installing Windows Subsystem for Android (WSA) with or without Google Play Store on Windows 10 and Windows 11.

features.title: Smart System Scan
features.desc: Detects VT-x, Hyper-V, VirtualMachinePlatform, HypervisorPlatform, and WSL in real-time using 5 different detection methods including CPUID, wmic, systeminfo, PowerShell, and registry.

features.title: Auto Configuration
features.desc: Enables all required Windows features automatically with administrator privileges. No manual BIOS changes or Windows Feature dialog hunting needed.

features.title: One-Click Install
features.desc: Handles download, extraction, and setup end-to-end. From archive to running Android subsystem in one click with 6 automated phases.

features.title: Play Store Patching
features.desc: Integrates Google Play Store (MindTheGapps 13.0) automatically with MagiskOnWSALocal patching and automated ADB authorization via pywinauto.

features.title: Parallel Chunked Downloads
features.desc: Downloads archives in 30 parallel chunks with resume support, real-time progress tracking, speed calculation, and ETA for fast reliable downloads.

features.title: WSAPatch for Windows 10
features.desc: Binary patches WsaClient.exe for compatibility on Windows 10, fixing the crash that occurs when running WSA on non-Windows 11 systems.

features.title: Background Service
features.desc: WSABackgroundService runs as a Windows SCM service monitoring WSA ADB port, managing the Play Store SDK, and auto-restarting on failure.

features.title: Self-Update System
features.desc: Checks the server for updates and installs them silently. 6-step update dialog with integrity verification, version checking, and seamless restart.

features.title: File Sharing (WebDAV)
features.desc: Mounts WSA filesystem as Windows drive letters (X:/ R:/) via WebDAV over ADB. Browse, edit, and transfer files seamlessly between Windows and Android.

features.title: Rust Security Gateway
features.desc: Zero-trust architecture with signature verification, encrypted config parsing, and anti-tamper protection via native Rust widget_ui.pyd module.

features.title: NSIS Professional Installer
features.desc: Industry-standard Windows installer with wizard UI, silent install support (/S), maintenance mode, repair, and uninstall options integrated with Windows Settings.

features.title: Embedded Python Runtime
features.desc: Self-contained Python 3.14 runtime for Play Store patcher at emb_py/. No external dependencies needed after installation — runs completely offline.

howItWorks.title: Download
howItWorks.desc: Download the WSA Installer setup file (228 MB) from the official release. Optionally download the bundle.wsa (1.21 GB) for offline installation without internet.

howItWorks.title: Run as Administrator
howItWorks.desc: Right-click WSA_Installer_Setup.exe and select 'Run as administrator'. Accept the UAC prompt to grant installation privileges for system-level changes.

howItWorks.title: System Check
howItWorks.desc: The installer automatically scans your system for virtualization support, Hyper-V, VirtualMachinePlatform, and WSL — and enables any missing features automatically.

howItWorks.title: Install WSA
howItWorks.desc: Downloads the correct WSA build (2407.40000.4.0), extracts the 7z archive, applies Developer Mode settings, patches WsaClient, and registers the Android subsystem.

howItWorks.title: Add Play Store
howItWorks.desc: Patches Google Apps (MindTheGapps 13.0) onto WSA via MagiskOnWSALocal, automates ADB authorization, and installs Play Store with shortcuts in the Start Menu.

howItWorks.title: Complete
howItWorks.desc: Play Store and WSA shortcuts appear in Start Menu. WSABackgroundService starts monitoring WSA status. Launch Android apps directly from your desktop.

screens.title: Welcome Screen
screens.desc: Clean intro page with glassmorphism design, version info, and installation path selection.

screens.title: System Check
screens.desc: Real-time virtualization detection with 5 verification methods and auto-fix capabilities.

screens.title: Download & Install
screens.desc: Parallel 30-chunk downloads with live progress bar, download speed, ETA, and merge status.

screens.title: Play Store Patching
screens.desc: Automated GApps integration with 7 sub-phases: locate, verify, extract, patch, ADB, install, finalize.

screens.title: Installation Complete
screens.desc: Final step creates shortcuts, configures background service, and offers WSA launch option.

screens.title: File Sharing
screens.desc: WebDAV-based filesystem mounting — browse, edit, and transfer Android files from Windows Explorer as X:/ and R:/ drives.

screens.title: App Interface Preview
screens.desc: Real-time installation dashboard showing download speed, progress, time remaining, and parallel chunk tracking.

screens.title: Social Preview
screens.desc: Open Graph image shown when sharing the WSA Installer website on social media platforms.

screens.title: QR Download
screens.desc: Scan this QR code on your phone to visit the website and download the installer directly.

screens.title: App Icon
screens.desc: WSA Installer application icon — the brand identity used across the installer and website.

windowsFeatures.name: VirtualMachinePlatform
windowsFeatures.desc: Required virtual machine platform for WSA

documentation.title: Flet GUI (app.py)
documentation.desc: ~11,000 lines of Python driving the 5-step frameless wizard, real-time progress UI, glassmorphism design, and all sub-dialogs including repair, update, uninstall, and file sharing.

documentation.title: InstallerLogic Engine
documentation.desc: Handles parallel chunked downloads with resume support, 7z extraction via tar.exe, WSA package verification (filelist.txt), registry patching, and ADB automation for Play Store.

documentation.title: WSABackgroundService
documentation.desc: Windows SCM service that monitors WSA ADB port, manages the Play Store SDK via embedded Python 3.14, auto-mounts WebDAV file shares (X:/ R:/), and checks for updates.

documentation.title: ConfigController
documentation.desc: Three-tier configuration system: Default → Developer Mode → Server (remote JSON). Source-tracked with schema validation. Polls GitHub for remote config updates every 60 seconds.

documentation.title: Rust Native Modules
documentation.desc: widget_ui.pyd provides a zero-trust security gateway with signature verification, encrypted config parsing, and decompression. playstore_patcher_mem.pyd is the Play Store patcher SDK.

documentation.title: Build Pipeline
documentation.desc: Nuitka compiles app.py → app.pyd for source protection. PyInstaller bundles into onedir. Flet.exe is patched with custom icon and version. NSIS creates the final setup EXE.

techStack.name: Rust
techStack.role: Security gateway & Play Store patcher SDK

techStack.name: PySide6
techStack.role: Qt6 bindings for Play Store patcher

faq.a: WSA Installer is a professional open-source tool that automates installing Windows Subsystem for Android (WSA) with Google Play Store on Windows 10/11. It handles system checks, downloads, extraction, patching, and configuration — all in one click.
Yes, WSA Installer is completely free and open-source under the MIT License. You can download, use, and modify it without any restrictions.

Windows 10 (build 19041+) or Windows 11, 8 GB RAM (16 GB recommended), 10 GB free disk space (SSD with 20 GB recommended), Intel VT-x or AMD-V virtualization enabled in BIOS, and Administrator privileges. The installer checks all these automatically.
Yes! WSA Installer fully supports Windows 10 (build 19041+). It includes the WSAPatch fix that binary patches WsaClient.exe for compatibility, fixing the crash that occurs on Windows 10 systems.

faq.q: Do I need to download anything separately?
faq.a: No. The installer handles everything. It downloads the correct WSA build from GitHub releases automatically. Optionally, you can download bundle.wsa (1.21 GB) for offline or air-gapped installation.

faq.q: How does Play Store integration work?
faq.a: The installer uses MindTheGapps 13.0 and MagiskOnWSALocal to patch Google Play Services and Play Store onto the WSA installation. ADB authorization is fully automated via pywinauto GUI automation — no manual ADB commands needed.

faq.q: Can I install WSA without Play Store?
faq.a: Yes. The installer offers two paths: 'Install WSA Basic' for a minimal WSA setup without Google apps, or 'Add Play Store' which patches MindTheGapps 13.0 onto the existing WSA installation.
Yes, WSABackgroundService is a Windows Service that monitors WSA status, manages the Play Store patcher SDK, auto-mounts file shares, and automatically restarts on failure.

faq.q: How do I update WSA Installer?
faq.a: The installer has a built-in self-update system with a 6-step dialog. It checks the server for new versions, downloads in parallel chunks, verifies integrity via PE header and version check, and installs silently.

faq.q: Is there a silent install option?
faq.a: Yes. Run 'WSA_Installer_Setup.exe /S' for a fully silent automated installation. Perfect for enterprise deployment, MDM solutions, and automation scenarios.

faq.q: WSA apps keep crashing after Windows Update — what do I do?
faq.a: Some Windows Updates (like KB5062553) have been known to break WSA GApps builds. WSA Installer helps by providing automated crash recovery, the ability to use NoGApps builds with Aurora Store, and a 4-step WSA repair dialog.

faq.q: What is the WSA bundle and do I need it?
faq.a: The bundle.wsa (1.21 GB) is a pre-packaged archive containing both WSA Basic and WSA+Play Store packages. It's optional — ideal for offline installation, air-gapped systems, or installing on multiple PCs without re-downloading.

faq.q: How does WSA Installer handle security?
faq.a: WSA Installer uses a zero-trust architecture with a Rust native security gateway (widget_ui.pyd) that provides signature verification, encrypted config parsing, and anti-tamper protection. Source code is protected via Nuitka compilation.

faq.q: Can I repair a broken WSA installation?
faq.a: Yes. WSA Installer includes a dedicated 4-step repair dialog: 1) Detect WSA installation, 2) Stop all WSA processes, 3) Backup user data, 4) Uninstall and reinstall WSA. Accessible from Windows Settings or CLI.

faq.q: How does file sharing between Windows and WSA work?
faq.a: WSA Installer includes a WebDAV-based file sharing system. It mounts the WSA filesystem as Windows drive letters (X:/ and R:/) via ADB, allowing you to browse, edit, and transfer files using Windows File Explorer.
